## Checklist

- [ ] `version:` in `config.yaml` was bumped (if user-visible).
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` for the add-on was updated.
- [ ] `lint` CI is green (hadolint, yamllint, shellcheck).
- [ ] I tested the change locally on a Home Assistant instance, or explained why a runtime test wasn't possible.
